news_items.title: Ivory Coast vs Norway Preview, Lineups & Team News | RotoWire
news_items.text:
Ivory Coast vs Norway Preview, Lineups & Team News | RotoWire

# Ivory Coast vs Norway Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Round of 32

Ivory Coast vs Norway clash in Arlington for their 2026 World Cup Round of 32 knockout. Predicted lineups, team news, tactical breakdown and score prediction.

Updated on June 30, 2026 2:20AM EST

Share

By:

Pierre Courtin

Adam Zdroik

Updated on June 30, 2026 2:20AM EST

World Cup

### Sign up for free to get the best advice and offers to dominate this season.

Subscribe Log In

From the latest news to creating the best starting lineup, we've got you covered - Sign-up today

# Ivory Coast vs Norway Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Round of 32

The Round of 32 serves up a genuine coin flip. Ivory Coast and Norway both advanced as group runners-up, and they could hardly be more different in how they got here. Ivory Coast leaned on organization, midfield control and tactical flexibility under coach Emerse Fae. Norway leaned on star power and set pieces, riding Erling Haaland and Martin Odegaard. This is the first competitive meeting between the two nations.

Norway car

news_items.title: Is Erling Haaland Playing Today? Norway Star's Status vs. Ivory Coast | FOX Sports
news_items.text:
Is Erling Haaland Playing Today? Norway Star's Status vs. Ivory Coast | FOX Sports

FIFA Men's World Cup

FIFA Men's World Cup

# Is Erling Haaland Playing Today? Norway Star's Status vs. Ivory Coast

Published Jun. 30, 2026 1:29 a.m. ET

share

facebookxredditlink

Erling Haaland was an unused substitute in Norway's 4-1 loss to France at Boston Stadium on Friday.

Norway will play its first knockout stage match at a men's FIFA World Cup since 1998 against the Ivory Coast on Tuesday, but will Haaland be available?

Here's everything to know about Haaland's status for Ivory Coast vs. Norway on Tuesday at Dallas Stadium:

## Is Erling Haaland Playing Today?

(Photo by Joe Prior/Visionhaus via Getty Images)

While Norway head coach Ståle Solbakken hasn't released his starting lineup for Ivory Coast vs. Norway yet, Erling Haaland is expected to be part of it. Haaland only sat out of Norway's group-stage finale to rest, as Ståle Solbakken explained after his team's loss to France.

"It’s a no-brainer," coach Ståle Solbakken said Friday after a 4-1 loss to France left the Norwegians in second place in the group. "The fans around Norway and also in the arena would have liked to see Erling

# Ivory Coast vs Norway Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Round of 32

The Round of 32 serves up a genuine coin flip. Ivory Coast and Norway both advanced as group runners-up, and they could hardly be more different in how they got here. Ivory Coast leaned on organization, midfield control and tactical flexibility under coach Emerse Fae. Norway leaned on star power and set pieces, riding Erling Haaland and Martin Odegaard. This is the first competitive meeting between the two nations.

# Is Erling Haaland Playing Today? Norway Star's Status vs. Ivory Coast

Published Jun. 30, 2026 1:29 a.m. ET

share

facebookxredditlink

Erling Haaland was an unused substitute in Norway's 4-1 loss to France at Boston Stadium on Friday.

Norway will play its first knockout stage match at a men's FIFA World Cup since 1998 against the Ivory Coast on Tuesday, but will Haaland be available?

Here's everything to know about Haaland's status for Ivory Coast vs. Norway on Tuesday at Dallas Stadium:

## Is Erling Haaland Playing Today?

(Photo by Joe Prior/Visionhaus via Getty Images)

While Norway head coach Ståle Solbakken hasn't released his starting lineup for Ivory Coast vs. Norway yet, Erling Haaland is expected to be part of it. Haaland only sat out of Norway's group-stage finale to rest, as Ståle Solbakken explained after his team's loss to France.
